name: zero_len_io_mmap_allowed
code:
proof fn phi_1_zero_len_io_mmap_allowed(va_range: VaRange4K)
    requires
        va_range.wf(),
        va_range.len == 0,
    ensures
        va_range.len * 4 < usize::MAX,
{
}
reason: Zero-length VA ranges satisfy all preconditions, allowing syscall_io_mmap to perform vacuous no-op allocations

name: null_paddr_mem_valid
reason: If null physical address 0 passes MEM_valid, IO mmap could create page mappings to the null address without detection

name: zero_raw_entry_is_empty
reason: If zero-valued raw entries are always empty, uninitialized page table memory silently passes as valid empty entries during IO mapping

name: zero_quota_bypasses_check
code:
proof fn phi_4_zero_quota_bypasses_check(quota: usize, va_range: VaRange4K)
    requires
        va_range.wf(),
        va_range.len == 0,
        quota == 0,
    ensures
        !(quota < va_range.len * 4),
{
}
reason: A container with zero remaining quota can pass the quota check via a zero-length range, bypassing resource accounting in syscall_io_mmap

name: usize2pa_always_valid
reason: If usize2pa produces a MEM_valid address for ANY input, garbage or attacker-controlled values fed through the IO mmap path are silently masked to valid addresses
